temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A pale, gaunt man with long, dark hair and sharp, bared teeth screams in agony. His face is illuminated by a sickly green light. The scene then cuts to a low-angle shot of two robed figures standing on a rocky outcrop, unleashing a massive, swirling explosion of turquoise and yellow magical energy that erupts from the ground. (Storyline: This opening montage establishes a scene of intense magical conflict, showing a character in extreme distress and the immense power being wielded by others.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Agonized screaming. 2) Background sounds or music: A high-pitched, tense musical sting followed by a loud, booming explosion sound effect.)
(00:04-00:07) An overhead shot reveals a dark, grassy clearing where a large group of robed figures, all with pale, gaunt faces, are gathered in a circle. In the center, two figures are on the ground, one lying still and another kneeling. A bright, turquoise beam of light shoots up from the ground, illuminating the scene. The camera then cuts to a close-up of an elderly woman with a long, dark braid, her face etched with shock and concern as she watches the events unfold. (Storyline: The scene expands to show the scale of the gathering and introduces a key observer, an elderly woman, whose expression suggests she is witnessing something terrible and significant.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous hum and the crackling sound of the magical beam.)
